insert.foreach: INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, item_id, quantity, served_quantity, status, price_at_order, assigned_table_display_id, quantity_distribution ) SELECT #{orderId}, mi.item_id, #{item.quantity}, 0, 'UNSERVED', #{item.priceAtOrder}, #{item.assignedTableDisplayId}, #{item.quantityDistribution, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM menu_items mi WHERE mi.item_code = #{item.itemCode}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, item_id, quantity, served_quantity, status, price_at_order ) SELECT #{orderId}, mi.item_id, #{quantity}, 0, 'UNSERVED', #{priceAtOrder} FROM menu_items mi WHERE mi.item_code = #{itemCode}
mapper.select: SELECT quantity, served_quantity FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_items SET served_quantity = quantity, status = 'SERVED' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('UNSERVED', 'PARTIALLY_SERVED','PREPARED')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('PARTIALLY_SERVED', 'SERVED')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_cancellations ( item_code, cancelled_quantity, cancellation_reason, before_status, cancellation_time ) VALUES ( #{itemCode}, #{cancelledQuantity}, #{reason}, #{beforeStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT oi.order_item_id AS orderItemId, mi.item_code AS itemCode, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.served_quantity AS servedQuantity, oi.status AS status, oi.assigned_table_display_id AS assignedTableDisplayId, oi.quantity_distribution AS quantityDistribution FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
AND oi.status = #{status}

update.foreach: UPDATE order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id SET oi.quantity = oi.quantity + #{item.quantity}, oi.status = CASE WHEN oi.served_quantity = 0 THEN 'UNSERVED' WHEN oi.served_quantity >= (oi.quantity + #{item.quantity}) THEN 'PREPARED' WHEN oi.served_quantity > 0 THEN 'PREPARING' ELSE 'PREPARING' END, oi.price_at_order = #{item.priceAtOrder} WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND mi.item_code = #{item.itemCode}

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, item_id, quantity, served_quantity, status, price_at_order ) SELECT #{orderId}, mi.item_id, #{item.quantity}, 0, #{initialStatus}, #{item.priceAtOrder} FROM menu_items mi WHERE mi.item_code = #{item.itemCode}

mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
SELECT quantity, served_quantity FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND item_id = #{itemId} LIMIT 1

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.prepared_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.served_table_display_id, oi.quantity_distribution, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.item_id = #{itemId} AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tableDisplayId}, oi.assigned_table_display_id) AND oi.status IN ('UNSERVED', 'PARTIALLY_SERVED', 'PREPARED') LIMIT 1

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.item_id, oi.quantity, oi.served_quantity, oi.prepared_quantity, oi.status, oi.price_at_order, oi.assigned_table_display_id, oi.served_table_display_id, oi.quantity_distribution, mi.item_code, mi.name AS item_name FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.item_id = mi.item_id WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE order_items oi JOIN ( SELECT order_item_id,
quantity AS old_quantity, served_quantity AS old_served_quantity, served_table_display_id AS old_served_table_display_id, assigned_table_display_id AS old_assigned_table_display_id,
(quantity - 1) AS new_quantity, CASE WHEN served_table_display_id IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tableDisplayId}, served_table_display_id) > 0 THEN GREATEST(0, served_quantity - 1) ELSE served_quantity END AS new_served_quantity FROM order_items WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId} ) calc ON oi.order_item_id = calc.order_item_id SET
oi.quantity = calc.new_quantity, oi.served_quantity = calc.new_served_quantity,
oi.status = CASE WHEN calc.new_served_quantity = 0 THEN 'UNSERVED' WHEN calc.new_served_quantity = calc.new_quantity THEN 'SERVED' ELSE 'PARTIALLY_SERVED' END,
oi.assigned_table_display_id = NULLIF( TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REPLACE(CONCAT(',', calc.old_assigned_table_display_id, ','), CONCAT(',', #{tableDisplayId}, ','), ',')), '' ), oi.served_table_display_id = NULLIF( TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REPLACE(CONCAT(',', calc.old_served_table_display_id, ','), CONCAT(',', #{tableDisplayId}, ','), ',')), '' ) WHERE oi.quantity > 0 AND oi.quantity_distribution IS NULL

UPDATE order_items SET quantity = #{newQuantity}, status = #{newStatus},
quantity_distribution = CASE WHEN #{newDistribution} IS NULL THEN quantity_distribution ELSE #{newDistribution} END, assigned_table_display_id = CASE WHEN #{newAssignedTableIds} IS NULL THEN assigned_table_display_id ELSE #{newAssignedTableIds} END WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
